mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCommentMapper.selectFrontCommentList */ SELECT COMMENT_SEQ /*댓글 일련번호*/ , CANDIDATE_SEQ /*후보자(대상) 일련번호*/ , MEMBER_SEQ /*회원 시퀀스*/ , CONTENT /*댓글 내용*/ , USE_YN /*사용 여부*/ , REGISTER_SEQ /*등록자 일련번호*/ , REGISTER_IP /*등록자 IP*/ , REGISTRATION_DT /*등록 일시*/ , UPDATER_SEQ /*수정자 일련번호*/ , UPDATER_IP /*수정자 IP*/ , UPDATE_DT /*수정 일시*/ FROM COMMENT WHERE USE_YN = true AND CANDIDATE_SEQ = #{candidateSeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCommentMapper.selectFrontCommentPage */ SELECT COMMENT_SEQ /*댓글 일련번호*/ , CANDIDATE_SEQ /*후보자(대상) 일련번호*/ , MEMBER_SEQ /*회원 시퀀스*/ , CONTENT /*댓글 내용*/ , USE_YN /*사용 여부*/ , REGISTER_SEQ /*등록자 일련번호*/ , REGISTER_IP /*등록자 IP*/ , REGISTRATION_DT /*등록 일시*/ , UPDATER_SEQ /*수정자 일련번호*/ , UPDATER_IP /*수정자 IP*/ , UPDATE_DT /*수정 일시*/ FROM COMMENT WHERE USE_YN = true AND CANDIDATE_SEQ = #{candidateSeq}
mapper.update: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCommentMapper.updateFrontComment */ UPDATE COMMENT SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , CANDIDATE_SEQ = #{candidateSeq} /*후보자(대상) 일련번호*/ , CONTENT = #{content} /*댓글 내용*/ WHERE COMMENT_SEQ = #{commentSeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCommentMapper.deleteFrontComment */ UPDATE COMMENT SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , USE_YN = FALSE WHERE COMMENT_SEQ = #{commentSeq}
